shocks.label: Breakout Tool Launch
shocks.description: A tool goes viral and creates massive awareness for the domain.

shocks.label: Free Open Source Model Drop
shocks.description: Major open source AI model released free, lowers barrier to entry.

shocks.label: Government AI Retraining Subsidy
shocks.description: Government funds AI training programs, boosting reskilling domains.

shocks.label: Market Crash
shocks.description: Broad market downturn reduces investment appetite.

key_drivers: Agents showed real try-out behavior before retention normalized
The domain captured broad attention during the run
key_risks: High disagreement across persona types signals uncertainty
Low adoption rate indicates weak demand signal
No tipping point reached -- adoption may stall
Attention converted poorly into durable adoption
Many agents tried it, but the funnel lost them before retention
